---
title: "About"
---

**On Guard** is a baseball data science blog with a bias toward coverage of the Cleveland Guardians.

Analysis is built on a Statcast graph database using Neo4j, with clustering, graph embeddings, and staged predictive models. The underlying tooling lives in the [neo4j_baseball](https://github.com/grrom/neo4j_baseball) repo.

Topics covered:

- Swing mechanics clustering and archetypes
- Pitch mechanics and sequencing
- Graph-based player similarity
- Guardians roster analysis
